case_title: RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES VS. DUBBELJU MOTORCYCLE RENTALS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE RAMIN BROUMAND, OWNER OF RLM ESXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE WOLFGANG TAFT, OWNER/MANAGER AT DUBBELJU MOTORCYCLE RENTALS, LLC. ERIC MORROW, ELECTRICIAN, AND LEONARD LEE, PROPERTY MANAGER, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUBBELJU MOTORCYCLE RENTALS LLC

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT DUBBELJU MOTORCYCLE RENTALS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RLM EXECUTIVE LIMOUSINE SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUBBELJU MOTORCYCLE RENTALS LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
